### Web Socket Origin Request Policy

Logical ID: `WebSocketOriginRequestPolicy5FA3946C`

用途推定: Web Socket Origin Request Policy (AWS::CloudFront::OriginRequestPolicy)

| 設定項目 | 値 |
| --- | --- |
